name: TODOS.md
purpose: Human-readable rendered view of todos.jsonl — 25 active, 24 completed todos spanning P0-P3. Auto-generated by scripts/planning/render-todos.js, do not edit directly.
notes: 17,305 bytes. Generated artifact — source of truth is todos.jsonl. Contains rich cross-session progress notes per todo. Render hook auto-updates this after every commit.

name: todos.jsonl
purpose: Machine-readable canonical todo registry — 49 records (25 active + 24 completed) with full JSON schema including id, title, description, priority, status, progress, tags, context (branch+files), timestamps.
notes: 50,715 bytes, 49 lines. Schema: {id, title, description, priority, status, progress, tags, context:{branch,files}, createdAt, updatedAt, completedAt}. The /todo skill reads/writes this file. Key data-loss risk: Write tool silently overwrites (T30 fixed). Portable schema pattern for JASON-OS /todo skill.

name: config.json
purpose: Planning system configuration — sets mode, depth, parallelization strategy for the PR Review Ecosystem v2 planning context.
notes: 254 bytes. Contents: {project: 'PR Review Ecosystem v2', mode: 'yolo', depth: 'comprehensive', parallelization: 'safe', created: '2026-02-28', notes: '...'}. Lightweight config artifact — semantics unclear (may be stale, tied to early planning epoch).

name: pr-body-session-279.md
purpose: Captured PR body draft for Session #279 commit bundle covering T29 synthesis-consolidation PLAN completion (15 steps) + T28 CAS milestones + opportunityLedgerRecord schema + skill version bumps.
notes: 23,366 bytes. Not a RESUME — a pre-written PR body stored as planning artifact to survive context clears. Session #278+#279 bundle. Pattern: session-scoped PR body draft saved to .planning/ to avoid regenerating after compaction. SoNash-specific content only.

name: session-285-RESUME
purpose: Single-doc context-clear handoff for Session #285 — TL;DR action (invoke /skill-audit recall), progress ledger for 6 goals, Goal #4 briefing for /recall audit, critical context that must survive /clear.
notes: Session #285, branch 41526, 15 commits ahead of origin/main. 7,800+ bytes. Invocation instruction at bottom: /skill-audit recall. Contains branch state, file lists, critical don't-lose context items. RESUME.md inside a session-numbered dir is the canonical SoNash session-bookmark pattern.

name: review-data-architecture-RESUME
purpose: Mid-plan context-clear handoff for review-data-architecture initiative — documents what was done (PR #516 R1+R2, 21-decision deep-plan execution) and what remains (tests, PR-retro dashboard, unexecuted plan steps).
notes: 3,539 bytes. Session #286, branch CAS-41726. Documents smoke test results (3938 pass), specific files touched, still-needed tests. RESUME.md embedded within a feature plan dir — variant of session-bookmark pattern (not standalone dir, nested in plan).

name: synthesis-consolidation-WAVE4_RESUME
purpose: Wave 4 resume handoff for T29 synthesis-consolidation — status (2/12 repos complete), next repo (crawl4ai at Standard depth), session transition artifact from Session #275.
notes: 9,561 bytes. Created Session #275. Files-to-read table included. Pattern: wave-scoped resume (not session-numbered dir). Status: deleted when Wave 4 Step 10 completes per embedded instruction. Now likely stale/obsolete (T29 complete as of Session #279).

name: content-analysis-system-STEP_A_HANDOFF
purpose: Multi-skill audit handoff created mid-Session #282 pre-context-clear — documents parity test PASS, correct audit order (handlers before wrappers), invocation for multi-mode /skill-audit on 7 CAS skills.
notes: 11,229 bytes. Session #282. Pattern: STEP_A_HANDOFF.md = mid-step handoff embedded in a feature plan dir. Distinguishable from RESUME.md (step-specific vs session-general). Plan step handoff sub-type of execution-handoff.

name: skill-audit-recall-phase4-HANDOFF
purpose: Deferred Phase 4 handoff for /recall skill audit — Cat 12 scored 2/10 (no self-audit.js), defers building 300-400 line self-audit.js to a separate session. Contains inputs, deliverables, test requirements.
notes: Session #285 (2026-04-17). Contains Cat 12-A decision (FULL CANONICAL FIX), R3 constraint (no skill-run state file for recall), deliverables list. Standalone dir for deferred phase — pattern: phase-specific dir with single HANDOFF.md.

name: skill-audit-synthesize-phase4-HANDOFF
purpose: Phase 4 implementation handoff for /synthesize skill audit — 109 decisions accepted, 4-wave implementation plan (enabler extraction, SKILL.md edits, scripts, wiring), projected score 72→108/120.
notes: Created Session #284 (2026-04-16). Status: ACTIVE (but work subsequently completed in Session #285). Same dir-per-deferred-phase pattern as recall-phase4. Contains wave plan with line-budget constraints.

name: t28-intelligence-graph-v1-DIAGNOSIS
purpose: Early diagnosis stub for T28 Intelligence Graph v1 feature — 5,109 bytes, single file. Likely represents an early exploration of intelligence/insight graph capabilities before T28 scope was redefined as Content Analysis System.
notes: 5,109 bytes. Only one file in this dir. T28 in current TODOS.md refers to CAS (Content Analysis System), not intelligence graph. Dir name 't28-intelligence-graph-v1' suggests this was an early naming that was superseded. Status: stub/superseded.

name: skill-audit-batch-mode
purpose: Planning dir for /skill-audit batch mode implementation — PLAN.md (28KB), DECISIONS.md, DIAGNOSIS.md, parity test procedure and results (PARITY_TEST.md), actual parity run logs (parity-run-batch.md, parity-run-single.md).
sanitize_fields: plan descriptions referencing SoNash-specific skill names
notes: 94,343 bytes total. Unique pattern: parity test run logs stored as .md files in planning dir (parity-run-single.md, parity-run-batch.md). These are execution artifacts, not just planning docs. PARITY_TEST.md documents procedure + PASS verdict. Session #281 (2026-04-14).

name: content-analysis-system
purpose: Multi-file planning dir for T28 CAS — PLAN.md (29KB, 15-step plan), DIAGNOSIS.md, DECISIONS.md, REMAINING_CAS_TASKS.md (punch list near T28 close), STEP_A_HANDOFF.md (multi-audit handoff).
notes: 67,693 bytes total. REMAINING_CAS_TASKS.md is a task-punch-list artifact (sub-type of execution-handoff). T28 marked complete 2026-04-18. Contains novel planning artifact types: step-specific HANDOFF + REMAINING_TASKS docs.

name: creator-view-upgrade
purpose: Planning dir for Creator View Upgrade feature — includes AUDIT.md (36KB, product audit artifact), DECISIONS.md, DIAGNOSIS.md, PLAN.md.
notes: 83,937 bytes total. Notable: AUDIT.md is a large product audit doc (36KB) — distinct from the standard PLAN+DIAGNOSIS+DECISIONS triad. Suggests pre-plan audit as its own planning artifact type.

name: dev-dashboard

notes: 41,670 bytes total. T2 status: in-progress, blocked on debt-runner (T3). Standard DIAGNOSIS+DECISIONS+PLAN triad.

name: github-health-skill

notes: 30,370 bytes total. T12 complete. Standard triad. Marked here as sanitize-then-portable because the skill itself is portable but plan references SoNash-specific context.

name: plan-orchestration
purpose: Planning dir for plan orchestration system (T6) — Wave 1 complete, Waves 2-3 blocked on T3. Contains CL-PROTOCOL.md (convergence-loop execution protocol, 15KB), PLAN.md, DECISIONS.md, DIAGNOSIS.md, wave0/ subdir with triage docs.
sanitize_fields: wave0 triage docs referencing SoNash file paths
notes: 49,652 bytes top-level files. CL-PROTOCOL.md (v1.1, 2026-03-24) is a portable cross-plan protocol doc — defines convergence-loop pattern for all plan execution, not plan-specific. wave0/ contains: AUDIT_SPEC.md, S0-*-triage.md, repo-cleanup-verification.md, wave0-audit.md. Status: blocked (T6 blocked on T3).

name: synthesis-consolidation
purpose: Planning dir for T29 synthesis-consolidation (/synthesize skill v2.0 + quick-scan migration) — PLAN.md (40KB), DECISIONS.md, DIAGNOSIS.md, WAVE4_RESUME.md (now stale — T29 complete), audit-step-10.5/ subdir.
notes: 67,825 bytes top-level. WAVE4_RESUME.md self-describes as deletable when Wave 4 Step 10 completes — T29 complete as of Session #279, so this file is now obsolete. audit-step-10.5/ contains CAS analysis JSON files (repo analysis outputs used during synthesis). T29 complete.

name: system-wide-standardization
purpose: Massive multi-artifact planning dir for SoNash system-wide standardization initiative — includes versioned PLANs (v1-v3), versioned DIAGNOSES, DISCOVERY_RECORD (125KB), DECISIONS (65KB), GAP-ANALYSIS, CAPTURE_MANIFEST, coordination JSON, 5 JSONL registries (decisions/directives/ideas/tenets/changelog).
sanitize_fields: SoNash-specific file paths in JSONL records
notes: 598,370 bytes total — the largest active planning dir. PLAN-v3.md alone is 123KB. DISCOVERY_RECORD.md is 125KB. decisions.jsonl has 93 records. directives.jsonl: 40 records, ideas.jsonl: 42, tenets.jsonl: 19. coordination.json and decisions-phase-map.json are orchestration artifacts. code-quality-overhaul/, tooling-infrastructure-audit/, learnings-effectiveness-audit/ subdirs each contain standard DIAGNOSIS+DECISIONS+PLAN triads. reference/sonash-source/ subdir present (SoNash source references). This is a multi-generation plan with rich machine-readable JSONL registries — the most schema-complete planning dir in the repo.

name: jason-os
purpose: Planning dir for JASON-OS research roadmap — 16-domain research program orchestration. PLAN.md (= research roadmap, 22KB), DECISIONS.md (35 decisions), RESEARCH_ROADMAP.md (domain status tracker), SYNTHESIS.md (rolling cross-domain synthesis, empty pending research), DEPENDENCIES.md (domain dependency graph).
notes: 41,285 bytes. Unique artifact composition: RESEARCH_ROADMAP.md is a living orchestration tracker (16-domain status table with milestone gates), SYNTHESIS.md is a rolling cross-domain synthesis placeholder, DEPENDENCIES.md is a dependency graph. These are research-program-specific artifact types not found in feature plan dirs. Domain 02a ongoing, Tier 1 not started. Closely related to .research/jason-os/ research outputs.

name: system-wide-standardization-CL-PROTOCOL
purpose: Convergence-loop execution protocol for plan orchestration and sub-plans — defines multi-pass CL structure adapted from /deep-research phases 1-4. Portable methodology document.
notes: 14,998 bytes. v1.1, 2026-03-24. Contains agent selection rules (always most capable model), CL phase structure, verification protocols. Portable: no SoNash-specific content. Already effectively ported to JASON-OS deep-research skill. This is a CANDIDATE for direct port to JASON-OS .claude/skills/_shared/CL-PROTOCOL.md or similar.

name: system-wide-standardization-CAPTURE_MANIFEST
purpose: Maps archived/folded planning documents to their target standardization steps with specific items each step's deep-plan MUST address. Ensures no planning decisions are lost during archive operations.
notes: 8,521 bytes. v1.0, 2026-03-11. A deferral-registry pattern: cross-references archived docs to ensure their items are consumed in future plan steps. This is a 'debt ledger for planning artifacts' — novel type not cleanly fitting existing plan_scope values.

notes: 1,709 bytes. v1.0, 2026-03-01. Historical record of first major milestone shipped.

notes: 6,652 bytes. v2.0, 2026-03-01. Was a live planning root doc, now archived after project matured. SoNash-specific content entirely.

name: archive-STATE

notes: 4,195 bytes. v3.2, 2026-03-30. Was a living state tracking doc — equivalent to session-bookmark at a higher scope level. References .planning/system-wide-standardization/ as current focus. Now superseded by session-specific RESUME.md pattern.

name: archive-dirs
purpose: Archive containing ~24 completed planning directories — agent-environment-analysis, cas-tag-quality, cli-tools-implementation, custom-agents, custom-statusline, deep-research-skill, ecosystem-expansion, ecosystem-v2, github-optimization-plan, hook-if-implementation, hook-system-overhaul, insight-report-work-locale, memory-system-audit, milestones/, orphan-detection, passive-surfacing-remediation, phases-v1.0/, propagation-enforcement, propagation-research, repo-analysis-skill, repo-cleanup, research-integrity-fix, review-lifecycle-overhaul, statusline-research, synthesis-wave5-agents, website-analysis, zero-warning-infra.
notes: Contains mostly standard DIAGNOSIS+DECISIONS+PLAN triads per initiative. Notable exceptions: synthesis-wave5-agents/ contains agent spec JSON files (MERGED.json, META_THEMES.json, SLICES.json, SOURCES.json) and JS build scripts — planning-adjacent execution artifacts. orphan-detection/ has findings JSONL files. Each archive dir could be a separate JSONL record but consolidated here given all are status:archived. D15a should expand if needed.
